title: tribulus terrestris var. cistoides
intro: Tribulus terrestris var. cistoides, also known as the spiny caltrop, is a perennial plant species that belongs to the family Zygophyllaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects, which are attributed to the presence of various bioactive compounds such as flavonoids and saponins. The health benefits associated with Tribulus terrestris var. cistoides include improved cardiovascular health, enhanced male fertility, and potential anti-aging effects, making it a popular herbal remedy in traditional medicine. The plant can be prepared in various forms, including capsules, tablets, and tinctures, which are often used to support overall well-being and alleviate specific health concerns.
